headline: How The ING Groep (ENXTAM:INGA) Investment Story Is Shifting On Fresh Targets And Assumptions
summary: ING Groep’s fair value estimate has been updated to €27.70 from €27.07, and recent analyst reports have also adjusted price targets in a similar range, including one move to €29.30 from €28.50. Those changes sit alongside at least one downgrade, giving you a mix of higher targets and added caution to weigh as you think about risk and reward. As you read on, you will see how these shifting targets fit into the broader story, as well as how to keep track of the evolving analyst...
